## Query class

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

Query builder for IndexedDB

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class Query<ResultType = unknown, DocumentType = unknown> extends AbstractQuery<ResultType, DocumentType> 
```
**Extends:** [AbstractQuery](./iodm-query.abstractquery.md)<!-- -->&lt;ResultType, DocumentType&gt;

## Example


```ts
const query1 = new Query(idb, "store-name");
const list = await query1.find({ $key: "text" });

const query2 = new Query(idb, "store-name");
const item = await query2.findById(id);
```
